crossComponentPatterns.tone: Dark neon editorial dashboard with high-contrast surfaces and vivid accent moments.
crossComponentPatterns.radius: Large softened corners driven by a 1.65rem base radius.
crossComponentPatterns.spacing: Compact rhythm derived from a 0.28rem spacing unit and dense data layouts.
crossComponentPatterns.emphasis: Critical actions rely on hot red/pink/cyan accents against charcoal surfaces.
crossComponentPatterns.elevation: Shadows remain subtle and close to the surface to preserve a technical feel.
